configuration.title: Kev teeb tsa
configuration.lede: Express defaults ib zaug nyob rau hauv lub repository config ntaub ntawv thiab cia txhua workflow inherit lawv. Kev nqis tes ua inputs yeej yeej thaum ob qho tib si muab.
configuration.intro: Override txoj kev nrog cov {configPath} tswv yim yog tias koj xav tau qhov chaw tsis yog lub neej ntawd.

fields.sourceLocale: Ntog rov qab mus rau qhov {sourceLocale} tswv yim yog tias tsis tau teeb tsa. Kuj tau xa mus rau Tus Neeg Txhais Lus raws li {fromLocale} yog li cov hlua luv luv tsis autodetected.
fields.toLocales: Tog twg los ib tug array los yog ib tug comma-cais hlua.
fields.includeExclude: Glob qauv ntsuam xyuas tawm tsam qhov tseeb thiab chaw ua hauj lwm-txheeb ze txoj kev.
fields.glossary: Tom qab txhais lus overrides. Lo lus-ciam teb paub (tuav {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} qeb — koj qhov kev lag luam / sau pob (kev cai lij choj, kev kho mob, kev lag luam suab, thiab lwm yam). Xa raws li {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Defaults rau {plain}. Siv {html} tsuas yog tias koj cov peev txheej muaj cov khoom siv tiag tiag HTML tawg.
fields.profanityAction: Yuav ua li cas kho cov ntsiab lus profane hauv cov zis txhais
fields.profanityMarker: Tsuas yog muaj txiaj ntsig thaum {profanityAction} yog {marked}.
fields.allowFallback: Teem rau {false} kom ua tsis tiav qhov kev txhais lus thaum koj lub {categoryId} tsis muaj kev xa tawm rau lub hom phiaj hauv zos es tsis txhob poob rov qab mus rau tus qauv dav dav.
fields.apiVersion: Tus neeg txhais lus REST API version. Defaults rau {version}.
fields.maxRetries: Qhov siab tshaj plaws rov sim ntawm cov lus teb HTTP ib ntus ({statusCodes}). Defaults rau {defaultRetries}. Tag nrho HTTP hu rau ib qho kev thov yog {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ms) ntawm ib qho kev pw tsaug zog rov qab. Defaults rau {defaultBackoff}. Azure lub {retryAfter} header yog honored raws nraim thaum muaj; txwv tsis pub jittered exponential backoff yog siv, capped ntawm tus nqi no.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Defaults rau {true}. Thaum nyob rau, tokens zoo li {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} thiab HTML cov chaw raug hloov nrog sentinel tokens ua ntej txhais lus thiab rov qab kho tom qab. Lov tes taw tsuas yog thaum qhov chaw txhob txwm muaj qhov chaw zoo li qhov tseeb.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ntxiv regex qauv (tsis muaj delimiters) ntxiv rau lub neej ntawd placeholder teeb, piv txwv li {angleToken} rau kev cai token syntax. Cov regexes tsis raug tsis quav ntsej.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Glob qauv sib phim tiv thaiv parser-theem yuam sij (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF chav tsev {xliffId}, INI / restext yuam sij). Cov yuam sij sib txuam yog poob los ntawm qhov kev thov thiab dhau los ntawm lawv qhov chaw tus nqi khaws cia.

steps.actionInputs: Qhov kev nqis tes ua nyeem cov tswv yim meej los ntawm kev ua haujlwm.
steps.config: Nws thauj khoom YAML config los ntawm {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Rau txhua daim teb sib koom, cov tswv yim yeej; txwv tsis pub siv tus nqi YAML.
steps.validation: Cov txiaj ntsig sib koom ua ke yog validated. Cov enums tsis raug (piv txwv li {invalidEnum}) ua rau qhov kev ua tsis tiav sai nrog cov lus meej.

tone.heading: Lub suab thiab kev lag luam, hauv cov ntsiab lus yooj yim
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API tsis muaj ib lub suab nrov. Ob qhov chaw ua ke los muab koj feem ntau ntawm tib qho kev tswj hwm:
tone.industryBody: siv {categoryId} taw tes rau ib qho Azure {customTranslatorLink} qeb uas tau kawm ntawm koj tus kheej corpus — kev cai lij choj, thev naus laus zis, kev kho mob, kev lag luam, lossis lwm yam. Qhov no yog qhov muaj zog tshaj plaws rau lub suab, hom suab thiab cov lus.
tone.surfaceBody: Siv cov {glossaryLink} los xauv cov npe lag luam thiab cov khoom lag luam cov lus verbatim, thiab siv {profanityAction} los txhuam cov lus tsis zoo thaum lub hom phiaj hauv zos rau cov neeg tuaj saib hluas.

items.region: Txhais lus resource cheeb tsam (omit rau cov peev txheej thoob ntiaj teb).

items.exclude: Newline-cais glob qauv; Cov ntaub ntawv sib txuam yog hla (thov tom qab suav nrog).

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} qeb — kev lag luam / domain / tone pob khawm Forwarded raws li {categoryQuery}.

items.allowFallback: Thaum {false}, Tus Neeg Txhais Lus rov qab ib qho yuam kev es tsis txhob poob rov qab mus rau qhov system dav dav yog tias koj lub {categoryId} tsis muaj kev xa tawm rau lub hom phiaj hauv zos.
items.apiVersion: Tus neeg txhais lus REST API version.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder tiv thaiv
resilienceInputs.intro: Cov tswv yim no tswj hwm yuav ua li cas qhov kev txiav txim thaum Lub Tshuab Txhais Lus throttles koj qhov kev thov thiab yuav ua li cas nws shields placeholder tokens xws li {mustache} los yog {indexZero} los ntawm raug mangled thaum lub sij hawm txhais lus.
resilienceInputs.caption: Kev ua siab ntev thiab qhov chaw tiv thaiv cov tswv yim

items.maxRetries: Qhov siab tshaj plaws rov sim ntawm cov lus teb HTTP ib ntus ({statusCodes}). Tag nrho cov naj npawb ntawm HTTP hu rau ib qho kev thov yog {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (hauv milliseconds) ntawm ib qho kev pw tsaug zog rov qab. Qhov kev nqis tes ua hwm Azure lub {retryAfter} teb header raws nraim thaum muaj; txwv tsis pub nws siv jittered exponential backoff capped ntawm tus nqi no.
items.protectPlaceholders: Thaum {true} (lub neej ntawd), qhov chaw xws li {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} thiab HTML cov chaw raug hloov nrog sentinel tokens ua ntej txhais lus thiab rov qab kho tom qab. Lov tes taw tsuas yog thaum koj qhov chaw txhob txwm muaj cov ntawv nyeem literal placeholder uas yuav tsum tau txhais.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-cais regexes (tsis muaj delimiters) ntxiv rau lub neej ntawd placeholder teeb, piv txwv li {angleToken} rau kev cai token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-cais glob qauv sib phim tiv thaiv parser-theem yuam sij (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF chav tsev {xliffId}, INI/restext yuam sij). Cov yuam sij sib txuam yog poob los ntawm tus neeg txhais lus thov thiab dhau los ntawm lawv qhov chaw tus nqi khaws cia.

formats.title: Cov ntaub ntawv tawm tswv yim
formats.heroTitle: Txaus siab ua ntaub ntawv tawm tswv yim
formats.lede: Rau round-trippable peev txheej hom ntawv. Qhov kev nqis tes ua nyeem txhua qhov chaw-locale cov ntaub ntawv, txhais cov nqis, thiab sau ib tug kwv tij rau ib lub hom phiaj hauv zos.
formats.namingConvention: Tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv siv lub {namingConvention} npe convention.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET cov ntaub ntawv peev txheej. Txhais cov ntawv sab hauv ntawm txhua lub {dataValue} node, khaws cov lus thiab metadata.
resx.specLabel: Microsoft Kawm — Cov khoom siv hauv .resx cov ntaub ntawv

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 cov ntaub ntawv. Txhais txhua {source} thiab sau qhov tshwm sim rau hauv qhov sib {target}, teeb {trgLang} rau lub zos.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object ntaub ntawv. Txhais txhua {msgid} / {msgidPlural} ua {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} ntawv.
po.specLabel: GNU gettext — PO hom ntaub ntawv

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON ntaub ntawv. Cov khoom ua zes yog flattened nrog lub {delimiter} delimiter rau kev txhais lus, tom qab ntawd rov ua zes ntawm cov zis. Dotted yuam sij ({dottedKey}) yog khaws cia verbatim.

ini.blurb: Cov ntaub ntawv yooj yim {keyValue} (Win32-style INI lossis txhua tiaj tiaj config). Tshooj headers thiab cov lus tau khaws cia.
ini.specLabel: INI cov ntaub ntawv hom ntawv ntawm Wikipedia

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI cov ntawv nyeem cov peev txheej — tiaj tus {keyValue} khub siv los ua tus khub ntawv {resx}.
restext.specLabel: Microsoft MUI txheej txheem cej luam

roundTrip.heading: Round-trip guarantees
roundTrip.body: Cov ntawv xeem suite txheeb xyuas byte-rau-byte round-tripping rau cov neeg sawv cev fixtures ntawm txhua hom ntawv. Yog hais tias ib hom ntawv quirk tawg round-tripping nyob rau hauv koj codebase, thov {issueLink} nrog ib tug tsawg kawg nkaus qauv.

customCategory.body: Cob qhia ib qho Azure {customTranslatorLink} qeb ntawm lub corpus uas ntes koj cov lus lag luam thiab lub suab nrov (kev cai lij choj, kev kho mob, kev lag luam, sab hauv-engineering, thiab lwm yam) thiab dhau nws tus ID los ntawm {categoryId}. Qhov no yog qhov muaj zog tshaj plaws tone lever Azure muab.

tone.body: Ua ke ib qho kev cai txhais lus {categoryId} {profanityAction} thiab {allowFallbackFalse} kom tswj hwm lub suab zoo ib yam thiab ua tsis tiav kev ua haujlwm yog tias qeb xaiv tsis muaj kev xa tawm rau ib qho ntawm koj lub hom phiaj hauv zos.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lede: Cov lus teb ceev rau cov lus nug uas tuaj txog feem ntau thaum txais yuav qhov kev ua.

azure.heading: Qhov kev txiav txim siab tham nrog Azure li cas?
azure.body: Los ntawm Microsoft tus nom {azureSdkLink} SDK, txheej ntawm {corePipelineLink}. Qhov ntawd tau txais koj tsis siv neeg rov sim ntawm {statusCodes}, ntaus ntawv thov thiab teb cov qauv, thiab kev txheeb xyuas lub taub hau tuav dawb - txhua yam uas siv los ua kev hu xov {axios} tooj ntawm tes. Cov pej xeem kev ua nto (cov tswv yim, cov zis, cov ntaub ntawv tawm) tsis hloov pauv.

tone.heading: Vim li cas cov lus txhais qee zaum tawm ntawm hom lossis tawm ntawm lub suab?
tone.body: Tshuab txhais lus defaults rau ib tug dav dav-hom phiaj qauv. Peb lub pob khawm pab: ib qho kev {glossaryLink} rau lub sij hawm nyuaj overrides, ib qho kev {customTranslatorLink} rau cov qauv zoo uas tau kawm ntawm koj lub suab thiab cov lus, thiab {profanityAction} txhuam lossis chij cov ntsiab lus tsis zoo.

duplicateFiles.heading: Kuv yuav ua li cas kom tsis txhob txhais tib cov ntaub ntawv ob zaug?
duplicateFiles.body: Ua rau cov haujlwm ua haujlwm ntawm cov {paths} uas phim koj cov ntaub ntawv qhov chaw-locale nkaus xwb, piv txwv li {sourceGlob}. Qhov kev txiav txim kuj muaj nws tus kheej ib-trigger ntaub ntawv lim thaum {githubToken} yog teem, nqaim ua hauj lwm rau cov ntaub ntawv nyob rau hauv qhov tseeb cog lus.

offline.heading: Kuv puas tuaj yeem khiav qhov kev txiav txim offline?
offline.body: Tsis raws nraim — Azure AI Txhais lus yog lub hlwb runtime. Tab sis koj tuaj yeem khiav nrog {dryRunTrue} los lees paub parsing thiab config yam tsis muaj kev thov HTTP rau kev txhais lus.

node.heading: Dab tsi Node version ua qhov kev nqis tes ua khiav?
node.body: v3 khiav ntawm GitHub Kev Ua {nodeRuntime} lub sijhawm runtime. Lub bundled JavaScript yog sib xws nrog Node 20, 22 thiab 24, uas yog dab tsi CI kuaj.

dist.heading: Cov {distDir} bundled los qhov twg los?
dist.body: GitHub JS kev nqis tes ua xa lawv cov JS tso ua ke hauv lub chaw cia khoom. Lub {distBuild} workflow rebuilds nws tom qab txhua kev sib koom ua ke rau {mainBranch} yog hais tias nws yuav drift, thiab {distCheck} blocks PRs uas yuav tsaws tawm-of-date tso zis.

formats.heading: Yuav ua li cas txog lwm cov peev txheej hom ntawv?
formats.body: Niaj hnub no: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} yog hais tias koj xav tau lwm — lub parser interface yog me me (parse → daim ntawv qhia → thov translations → hom ntawv) thiab kev pab yog txais tos.

coverage.heading: Cov kev pab them nqi
coverage.body: Lub Jest config tswj hwm kev pab them nqi yam tsawg kawg nkaus. Cov cai tshiab yuav tsum khaws cov nqe lus + kab siab dua 78% thiab ua haujlwm siab dua 90%. Ntxiv fixtures thiab kev sim ib sab ntawm koj qhov kev hloov pauv.

docsSite.heading: Cov ntaub ntawv chaw
docsSite.body: Lub nplaub tshev {docsDir} yog Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 project. Khiav {npmInstall} ntawd ib zaug, tom qab ntawd {npmRunDev} rau kev saib ua ntej hauv zos. Lub {pagesWorkflow} workflow xa cov ntaub ntawv mus rau GitHub Nplooj ntawv ntawm txhua qhov kev sib koom ua ke.

changelog.title: Kev hloov pauv
changelog.lede: Cov ntsiab lus qib siab ntawm kev tso tawm. Lub canonical, authoritative changelog nyob rau hauv CHANGELOG.md nyob rau hauv lub repository.
changelog.fullRecord: Saib {changelogLink} rau tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv.

v3.heading: v3 (nyob rau hauv txoj kev loj hlob)

labels.perKeyOptOut: Ib qho tseem ceeb xaiv tawm:

items.newInputs: Cov tswv yim tshiab: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, ntxiv rau cov lus txhais lus siab {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker} thiab {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale yog tam sim no kuj xa mus rau Tus Neeg Txhais Lus raws li {fromLocale} li ntawd luv hlua yog tsis autodetected.
items.resilience: {label} tsis siv neeg rov sim ntawm transient HTTP teb ({statusCodes}) hwm Azure lub {retryAfter} header — ntog rov qab mus rau jittered exponential backoff thaum tsis muaj. Tunable los ntawm {maxRetries} thiab {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens zoo li {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} thiab HTML cov chaw tau qhwv hauv sentinels ua ntej txhais lus thiab rov qab kho tom qab, yog li Tus Neeg Txhais Lus nres mangling i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf qhov chaw. Toggle ntawm {protectPlaceholders}; txuas nrog {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} cov tswv yim tshiab {noTranslatePatterns} poob cov yuam sij sib txuam los ntawm Tus Neeg Txhais Lus thov tag nrho (khaws cov txiaj ntsig ntawm cov npe lag luam, cov lej yuam kev, thiab lwm yam). Phim glob qauv tiv thaiv parser-theem yuam sij (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF chav tsev {xliffId}, INI/restext yuam sij). {issue}
items.glossary: Kev txhawb nqa glossary, cov kauj ruam ntsiab lus ntawm {coreSummary}.

items.audit: npm audit huv (0 qhov tsis muaj zog).
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site nrog saib kev hloov pauv thiab Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Logo glyphs hloov mus rau txoj kev kom lawv tsis ua tiav cov xim-sib piv tiv thaiv gradient nres, lub ntab {backToTop} khawm siv {inert} thaum muab zais (es tsis txhob muaj {ariaHidden} toggle uas ua rau nws tabbable), {formatsAstro} ntu tsis sib tsoo nrog lawv cov pib-tsim cov npe IDs, peb daim npav locale tam sim no nthuav tawm BCP-47-siv tau {lang} yam ntxwv ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), theej tawm {documentation} cov cim cim yog disambiguated ntawm sidebar thiab footer,  thiab txhua lub rooj ntaub ntawv ntawm {inputs} / {configuration} nkoj nrog lub vijtsam-nyeem ntawv caption.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} tam sim no hnav lub sov / amber ntsiab lus accent — txawv los ntawm lub hom→accent palette siv rau kev sib txuas thiab cov ntsiab lus.
